source: on-chain Comptroller.getAllMarkets() (0x3d9819210A31b4961b30EF54bE2aeD79B9c9Cd3B) for the live cToken market set + compound-finance/compound-config networks/mainnet.json (Comptroller/Maximillion/COMP/Governor/Timelock addrs) + Etherscan-verified ABIs
note: Compound v2 (cToken/Comptroller) mainnet (chain 1) contract inventory. cover = user lending/collateral/claim/delegation surface; exclude = governance/timelock/legacy. cToken market universe is the 20 markets returned by Comptroller.getAllMarkets() (19 CErc20 share cerc20.abi.json via addresses[]; cETH=CEther separate). Deprecated markets retained as cover (redeem/repay still callable). Compound v2 is mainnet-only by protocol design (never multi-chained).

contracts.name: cETH (CEther market)
contracts.reason: user lending market for native ETH; payable mint/repay overloads

contracts.name: Comptroller (Unitroller proxy)
contracts.reason: user collateral + COMP-claim surface: enterMarkets/exitMarket/claimComp

contracts.name: Maximillion
contracts.reason: cETH max-repay helper (repayBehalf)

contracts.name: COMP (Comp token)
contracts.reason: governance token: delegate/delegateBySig voting-power delegation primitive

contracts.name: GovernorBravoDelegator
contracts.reason: DEFERRED: governance voting + proposal lifecycle (castVote*/propose*/queue/execute/cancel). No fund- or permission-delegation surface and no governance-vote ActionBody domain yet; the Dambi-relevant primitive (COMP voting-power delegation) IS covered via the COMP token. Follow-up: governance-domain round.

contracts.name: Timelock
contracts.reason: governance execution timelock; admin-only queue/execute, not a user pre-sign action

contracts.name: GovernorAlpha (legacy)
contracts.reason: retired governor superseded by GovernorBravo; no current user surface
